post.summary: Confirm Stripe Checkout and record a payment transaction
post.description: Authenticated renter only. Retrieves the Checkout Session from Stripe, verifies payment_status is paid and metadata.car_rental_id belongs to the current user, then inserts a Transaction row.

200.description: Transaction recorded or already present for this session

403.description: Session rental does not belong to the authenticated user

message.example: This payment does not belong to your account

422.description: Validation error, Stripe API error, unpaid session, or missing metadata

post.description: Receives Stripe webhook events. Verifies `Stripe-Signature` using STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET. On `checkout.session.completed`, inserts a Transaction when metadata contains car_rental_id.

requestBody.description: Raw JSON body of the Stripe Event (must not be re-encoded; used for signature verification).

503.description: stripe/stripe-php missing or STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET not set

post.summary: Ingest checkout completion from Stripe gateway (Node)
post.description: Internal use: the Node `/stripe` service verifies the Stripe webhook, then forwards a minimal payload here. Requires header `X-Stripe-Gateway-Secret` matching STRIPE_GATEWAY_INGEST_SECRET.

422.description: Validation failed or business rule error
